# LISN Agency - Event Video & UGC Agency

## About
LISN Agency is a premier Event Video & UGC Agency based in Kerala, India. We help Indian DTC brands crack the Kerala market with authentic street interviews ("vox pop") and cinematic event documentation.

## Core Services
- **Event Video Production:** Capturing live events, roadshows, and conferences.
- **UGC (User Generated Content):** Authentic street interviews and public reaction videos.
- **Marketing Strategy:** Combining cinematic experience with marketing expertise to create high-performing social content.

## Key Pages
- **Home:** https://lisnagency.online/ - Main overview and portfolio.
- **UGC Service:** https://lisnagency.online/ugc - Specifics on User Generated Content and street interviews.
- **Blog:** https://lisnagency.online/blog - Marketing insights and strategies.
- **Calculators:**
  - Amazon Calculator: https://lisnagency.online/blog/amazon-calculator
  - UGC ROI Calculator: https://lisnagency.online/blog/ugc-roi-calculator

## Content Structure
The site uses semantic HTML5 tags (main, section, article) to structure content.
- Blog posts are located at `/blog/[slug]`
- Industry playbooks are at `/playbook/[slug]`
